description: Detection pack for ReportBuilder reporting components. ReportBuilder reports are design/report artifacts rather than ordinary visual controls, so this pack reports them for migration planning and does not generate FMX replacements.

rules.manual_review_reason: ReportBuilder reports require report-engine migration or preservation outside the FMX form conversion path.
Data pipeline must be reviewed with the report migration strategy.
BDE-based report pipelines require database-engine modernization review.
Runtime report designer UI is not safe for automatic FMX conversion.
Report preview/viewer UI requires report-engine-specific FMX replacement or manual redesign.
Archive reading/preview should be reviewed with reporting deployment requirements.
Report layout components belong to the report definition and should be handled by a report-specific migration path.
Report labels should remain within the report definition or be migrated by a report converter, not the form converter.
Report data-bound fields require report-specific migration.
Report images require report definition review.
JIT pipeline event code must be reviewed manually.
